findings.summary: 2 YouTube accounts intent was narrowed to one without primary provenance.
findings.recommendation: Restore a multi-source registry with the supplied consulting channel as required priority 1 and the second account as pending identification.

findings.summary: REQ1c automatic updates were weakened to a manually invoked --watch command.
findings.recommendation: Fold a provider-neutral idempotent one-shot sync, cursor, lease, retry and alert contract into C02 and make it schedulable while retaining C04 as the manual control surface.

findings.summary: Backfill can report success after excluding unavailable videos from the denominator.
findings.recommendation: Keep every discovered video in the reconciliation ledger; temporary/unavailable states remain blockers unless explicitly waived, and FULL_BACKFILL_PASS requires content coverage 100 percent.

findings.summary: Knowledge dependency edges have no producer, evidence, confidence or review-state owner.
findings.recommendation: Add C08 knowledge-relation-extractor and keep C06 focused on deterministic graph build and validation.

findings.summary: C07 treats plan task graphs as if they were built harness artifacts and has no artifact-index producer.
findings.recommendation: Add C05 harness-artifact indexer over task graph, task state, route reports, build traces, composition, EVALS and real paths; C07 consults the normalized index.

findings.summary: C07 passes shape validation but its parent-skill-build route is not executable for an existing parent outside inventory.
findings.recommendation: Hoist C07 to plugin-root/plugin-scaffold and add script-route dry-run verification to the handoff completion gate.

findings.summary: The two-file non-regression allowlist contradicts required EVALS, manifest, composition, package contract and documentation updates.
findings.recommendation: Replace it with a surface-by-owner additive change matrix and parity tests.

findings.summary: Non-skill components lack explicit binary acceptance contracts and P04 test ownership.
findings.recommendation: Add acceptance_contract blocks to every non-skill component and cover all eight components in P04/P07/P09.
